entity.summary: Native Haven1 spot decentralized exchange based on concentrated-liquidity AMM design, providing token swaps, liquidity pools, liquidity incentives, automated-liquidity-management integrations, and network-enforced security protections.
entity.notes: Current first-party Haven1 documentation identifies hSwap as the network's live AMM spot DEX and documents hSwap V2, concentrated-liquidity trading, LP incentives, ALM integrations, MEV protections, and network-level security controls.

evidence.title: hSwap: Spot DEX on Haven1
evidence.notes: First-party product documentation identifies hSwap as a publicly available Haven1 AMM spot DEX and documents the V2 concentrated-liquidity design, network security model, live application link, swaps, XP rewards, and planned liquidity integrations.

evidence.title: Haven1 Core Protocols
evidence.notes: Current first-party core-protocol documentation marks hSwap as a live AMM DEX and describes deep liquidity pools, trading, liquidity incentives, and automated liquidity management.

evidence.title: Haven1 official documentation
evidence.notes: First-party Haven1 documentation provides the network context and links hSwap as a core product alongside bridge, earn, lending, staking, governance, and developer resources.
